name: grid_25
prompt:
A 5x5 grid of cute western cartoon game item icons on clean WHITE BACKGROUND, illustration style, adorable cartoon characters, kawaii style, vibrant cute colors. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO WORDS, NO NUMBERS anywhere. NO TEXT LABELS. ICONS ONLY. NO BLACK BORDERS, NO GRID LINES. Image size: 1024x1024, square canvas. Grid layout with equal spacing:

Row 1: gold coin, fossil, fossil, fossil, fossil
Row 2: fossil, fossil, fossil, fossil, complete fossil
Row 3: dragon egg, dragon egg, dragon egg, dragon egg, tool
Row 4: tool, tool, tool, tool, tool
Row 5: tool, tool, tool, device, device

Pure icons only, white background, cute cartoon graphics without any text.
